coverageNote: Two-phase collection. Full metadata (title, labels, linked issues) for all 7516 merged PRs. File paths enriched for 2830 PRs from 125 active engineers. Review signals captured for all 125 active engineers via reviewed-by queries.

productImpact.formula: Feature PRs × 3 + linked-issue PRs × 2 + core-product PRs × 1. Title/label signals for all PRs; file-area signals for enriched PRs.

orgLeverage.formula: Formal reviews × 2 × complexity weight (0.5–1.0 by PR size) + log₂(distinct colleagues + 1) × 2. Sourced from reviewed-by: queries, covering all active engineers.

reliabilityQuality.formula: Bug fixes × 2 + tests × 1.5 + perf × 1.5 + refactors × 1 + migrations × 1 + CI × 0.5. A PR can score multiple categories.

ownershipComplexity.formula: Cross-stack PRs × 2 + migration/schema × 1.5 + infra × 1 + file-breadth (0–1, capped at 30). Cross-stack detection requires file enrichment.

engineers.explanation: Product contributor in frontend/src and products/user_interviews — 174 features shipped, 2 tracked issues resolved, 52 cross-stack PRs, 32 schema migrations; reviewed 137 PRs for 51 colleagues.
